subject: CRITICAL: BDV2 Repository Confusion Blocking Progress

content.issue: Workers implementing BDV2 features in wrong repository
content.impact: All BDV2 validation failures traced to workers working in /home/ubuntu/clawd instead of /home/ubuntu/repos/bible-drawing-v2
content.root_cause: Task descriptions don't explicitly specify working directory

status.authentication: VERIFIED WORKING by PM - not the issue
status.worker_spawning: BLOCKED - coordinator cannot spawn workers due to allowlist

proposed_solution.immediate: Update all BDV2 task descriptions to explicitly state: 'Working Directory: /home/ubuntu/repos/bible-drawing-v2'
proposed_solution.systemic: Create task template with mandatory repository field for all projects

content.blocked_capacity: All BDV2 progress blocked due to repository confusion
